title: Skill Distillation and Publishing Flow
interaction_flow: Caller/GEP → skillDistiller: autoDistill() OR shouldDistill() check
skillDistiller → FileSystem: collectDistillationData() — reads capsules.json, genes.json, events.jsonl from GEP_ASSETS_DIR
skillDistiller → skillDistiller: analyzePatterns(data) — identifies high_frequency (count>=5), strategy_drift, coverage_gaps
skillDistiller → skillDistiller: shouldDistill() — checks SKILL_DISTILLER env, min capsule threshold, interval since last distillation
skillDistiller → skillDistiller: synthesizeGeneFromPatterns(data, analysis, genes) — builds distilled Gene object
skillDistiller → sanitize: sanitizePayload(capsule) — deep-clones & redacts tokens/keys/paths/emails from payload; returns sanitized copy
sanitize → sanitize: redactString(str) — applies REDACT_PATTERNS (Bearer tokens, sk-*, AWS, GitHub, npm, private keys, emails, .env refs)
sanitize → skillDistiller: return sanitizedCapsule
skillDistiller → llmReview: runLlmReview({diff, gene, signals, mutation})
llmReview → llmReview: isLlmReviewEnabled() — checks EVOLVER_LLM_REVIEW env var
llmReview → llmReview: buildReviewPrompt({diff, gene, signals, mutation}) — builds structured review prompt with criteria
llmReview → child_process: execFileSync(node, ['-e', reviewScript, tmpFile]) — timeout 30s
llmReview → skillDistiller: return {approved: bool, confidence: 0.0-1.0, concerns: [], summary: string}
skillDistiller → skillDistiller: [alt] if !approved → abort distillation
skillDistiller → policyCheck: checkConstraints(gene, ...) — checks blast radius, forbidden_paths, max_files, validation commands
policyCheck → policyCheck: isForbiddenPath(), isConstraintCountedPath(), isValidationCommandAllowed() — strips unsafe commands (rm -rf, node -e/--eval)
policyCheck → skillDistiller: return constraints result (pass/fail)
skillDistiller → skillDistiller: [alt] if policy fails → abort with reason

skillDistiller → skillDistiller: validateSynthesizedGene(gene, existingGenes) — validates type/id/signals_match/strategy; auto-prefixes id with gene_distilled_; caps max_files; deduplicates id; strips unsafe validation cmds
skillDistiller → skillDistiller: writeDistillerState({last_distillation_at, last_data_hash, distillation_count}) — persists state
skillDistiller → skillPublisher: publishSkillToHub(gene, opts) — {category, tags}
skillPublisher → skillDistiller: sanitizeSignalsMatch(signals_match) — lazy require, sanitizes signal tags
skillPublisher → skillPublisher: geneToSkillMd(gene) — renders SKILL.md content (name, description, When to Use, Trigger Signals, Preconditions, Strategy, Constraints, Validation, Metadata)
skillPublisher → skillPublisher: sanitizeSkillName(gene.id) — strips gene_distilled_ prefix, timestamps, converts to kebab-case
skillPublisher → a2aProtocol: getHubUrl(), getNodeId(), buildHubHeaders()
skillPublisher → Hub API: POST /a2a/skill/store/publish {sender_id, skill_id, content, category, tags} — timeout 15s
Hub API → skillPublisher: return HTTP 201/200 (created) OR 409 (conflict/already exists)
skillPublisher → skillPublisher: [alt 409] updateSkillOnHub(nodeId, skillId, content, opts, gene)
skillPublisher → Hub API: PUT /a2a/skill/store/update {sender_id, skill_id, content, category, tags, changelog: 'Iterative evolution update'} — timeout 15s
Hub API → skillPublisher: return HTTP 200-299
skillPublisher → skillDistiller: return {ok: boolean, result?: object, error?: string}
skillDistiller → Caller/GEP: return {ok: boolean, gene: Gene, reason?: string}
key_relationships: skillDistiller depends_on llmReview (runLlmReview) — optional gated by EVOLVER_LLM_REVIEW env
skillPublisher calls Hub API via fetch POST/PUT

skillDistiller: autoDistill() → {ok: bool, gene?: Gene, reason?: string}
validateSynthesizedGene(gene, existingGenes) → {valid: bool, gene: Gene, errors: string[]}
sanitize: sanitizePayload(capsule) → object — deep-clone + redact, does NOT modify original
redactString(str) → string — replaces sensitive patterns with [REDACTED]
llmReview: runLlmReview({diff, gene, signals, mutation}) → {approved, confidence, concerns, summary} | null
policyCheck: isValidationCommandAllowed(cmd) → boolean — blocks rm -rf, node -e, node --eval, node -p
skillPublisher: publishSkillToHub(gene, opts) → Promise<{ok: bool, result?, error?}>
updateSkillOnHub(nodeId, skillId, content, opts, gene) → Promise<{ok: bool, result?, error?}>
sanitizeSkillName(rawName) → string|null — kebab-case, strips timestamps/gene_ prefix

conditional_branches: policyCheck fails → distillation aborted with reason
Hub API returns 409 → publishSkillToHub delegates to updateSkillOnHub (PUT instead of POST)
shouldDistill() false → no distillation (SKILL_DISTILLER=false, insufficient capsules, or interval not met)
idempotent_skip: same data hash as last run → prepareDistillation returns ok=false, reason='idempotent_skip'

data_objects.Gene: { type:'Gene', id:'gene_distilled_*', category, signals_match:[], strategy:[], preconditions?, constraints:{max_files, forbidden_paths}, validation?:[], summary?, schema_version, _distilled_meta:{source_capsule_count} }
data_objects.Capsule: { type:'Capsule', id, gene, trigger:[], summary, outcome:{status:'success'|'failed', score:0-1} }
data_objects.HubUpdateBody: { sender_id, skill_id, content, category, tags, changelog:'Iterative evolution update' }

important_notes: skillDistiller.js is obfuscated (hex-encoded identifiers) — API surface reconstructed from test file exports
sanitizePayload does NOT modify original; returns deep-cloned sanitized copy
policyCheck enforces BLAST_RADIUS_HARD_CAP_FILES and BLAST_RADIUS_HARD_CAP_LINES constants
Distillation threshold: >= ~10-12 successful capsules (score >= threshold), interval-gated
skillPublisher lazy-requires skillDistiller to call sanitizeSignalsMatch — circular dep guard
Hub endpoints: POST /a2a/skill/store/publish, PUT /a2a/skill/store/update — both via a2aProtocol headers, 15s timeout
SKILL.md includes license footer referencing EvoMap Skill License (ESL-1.0)
source_files_analyzed: ir_postprocessed.json (IR entries for all four modules)
